query: INSERT INTO practiceTestQuestions (practiceTestId, questionText, questionType, options, correctAnswer, explanation) SELECT id, 'Which of the following best describes the main idea of the passage?', 'multiple_choice', JSON_ARRAY('A) The importance of education', 'B) The challenges of modern technology', 'C) The history of communication', 'D) The future of society'), 'A', 'The passage primarily focuses on how education shapes individual success and societal progress.' FROM practiceTests WHERE title = 'RLA Practice Test 1' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'What does the word ambiguous mean in this context?', 'multiple_choice', JSON_ARRAY('A) Clear and definite', 'B) Open to more than one interpretation', 'C) Difficult to understand', 'D) Intentionally misleading'), 'B', 'Ambiguous means having more than one possible meaning or interpretation.' FROM practiceTests WHERE title = 'RLA Practice Test 1' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Which sentence contains a grammatical error?', 'multiple_choice', JSON_ARRAY('A) She walks to the store every morning.', 'B) He don''t like chocolate ice cream.', 'C) They are going to the park tomorrow.', 'D) I have finished my homework.'), 'B', 'The correct form should be He doesn''t like not He don''t like.' FROM practiceTests WHERE title = 'RLA Practice Test 1' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'What is the author''s tone in this passage?', 'multiple_choice', JSON_ARRAY('A) Angry and bitter', 'B) Hopeful and optimistic', 'C) Neutral and factual', 'D) Sarcastic and mocking'), 'B', 'The author uses positive language and emphasizes possibilities, indicating a hopeful and optimistic tone.' FROM practiceTests WHERE title = 'RLA Practice Test 1';
